blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 38 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
